item: #11 Verify producers can see assigned contact details
need_from_user: Confirm in PostHog/manually whether producer-role users can open contact-detail pages for contacts they own. The ACL was tightened in commit 6b221b7 (lead write endpoints); contact view may also need an audit. If you can give me a producer login I can run a Playwright check end-to-end.
context: Producers may have lost view access after the ACL tightening on lead write endpoints (commit 6b221b7). Need confirmation before changing more code.

need_from_user: What answer should I send Mike? The CRM has a Lead import data-grid (DataTransfer package) that supports CSV and XLS — but I don't know if Mike wants the standard mapper or a Datalot-specific mapping. Need either the Datalot file format or permission to use the generic Excel importer.
context: DataTransfer package exists for imports but Datalot column mapping unspecified.

need_from_user: Need scope: should managers see (a) every producer's calendar in a single combined view, (b) one producer at a time via a picker, or (c) only the next-action items, not the full calendar? Also: does "manager" mean the Manager role or anyone above producer? Tell me which and I'll implement.
context: Calendar exists in admin/activities; ACL currently scopes by ownership.
